b1: Every morning, I usually drink a glass of water.

Every morning, I usually reflect on the previous day's achievements.

b1: I tend to drink tea when I feel cold.
I tend to listen to music when I clean the house.
I tend to go for a walk when the weather is nice.

I tend to analyze every detail when I'm under significant pressure.
I tend to become quite competitive when intellectual challenges arise.
I tend to underestimate the time required when starting new projects.
I tend to rely on intuition when objective data is unavailable.

b1: As a rule, I never eat chocolate before bed.

As a rule, I never judge a situation before hearing both sides.
As a rule, I never settle for mediocrity in my professional work.
As a rule, I never ignore feedback, even if it is critical.
As a rule, I never allow minor setbacks to derail my long-term vision.

pattern: I make it a point to ... at least once a day.
kor: 적어도 하루에 한 번은 꼭 ...하려고 노력해요
b1: I make it a point to call my parents at least once a day.
I make it a point to eat fruit at least once a day.
I make it a point to walk outside at least once a day.
I make it a point to smile at a stranger at least once a day.
I make it a point to clean my room at least once a day.
b2: I make it a point to read at least ten pages at least once a day.
I make it a point to exercise for thirty minutes at least once a day.
I make it a point to learn a new word at least once a day.
I make it a point to check my bank balance at least once a day.
I make it a point to tidy my desk at least once a day.
c1: I make it a point to practice gratitude at least once a day.
I make it a point to step out of my comfort zone at least once a day.
I make it a point to disconnect from digital devices at least once a day.
I make it a point to offer sincere praise to someone at least once a day.
I make it a point to reflect on my core values at least once a day.

Before anything else, I always ensure my workspace is organized for clarity.
Before anything else, I always establish the primary objective of the day.
